title: hydrocotyle alata
intro: Hydrocotyle alata, also known as Indian pennywort or Tinospora glabra, is a type of flowering plant in the hydrocotyle family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle alata include reducing anxiety and stress, improving cognitive function, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Hydrocotyle alata can be found in various forms, including capsules, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
